by Paul Gauguin

by Paul Gauguin

Maoris and Animals
by Paul Gauguin

Nativity (Mother and Child Surrounded by Five Figures)
by Paul Gauguin
France · 1897–1903 · Transfer drawing in brown and black ink (recto) and graphite and red chalk (verso) on cream wove paper trimmed and perimeter mounted on cream laid paper

by Paul Gauguin
France · Post-Impressionism · 1901 · Oil on linen canvas

by Paul Gauguin
